day1_night_start.name: Me
day1_night_start.text: *Home. Lying on my bed, the whole day flashes before my eyes.*

day1_night_2.name: Me
day1_night_2.text: *New school, new people. Everyone was unusually kind to me. Is it because I'm the transfer student, or...*

day1_night_3.name: Me
day1_night_3.text: *...No. It's just a nice school. Stop overthinking.*

day1_night_phone.name: Me
day1_night_phone.text: *I check my phone. Messages from old school friends... there are none.*

day1_night_phone_2.name: Me
day1_night_phone_2.text: *Weird. The group chat is silent too... Well, everyone must be busy.*

day1_night_sleep.name: Me
day1_night_sleep.text: *I pull the covers up. I wonder what tomorrow will bring. I'm looking forward to it.*

day1_night_sleep_2.name: Me
day1_night_sleep_2.text: *...Just before drifting off, I thought I saw a flash of light outside my window. Like a camera flash... No, must be a dream.*
